I think I was pleasantly surprised mainly with the New Year's set meal for dinner. There are quite a few choices for breakfast. The hotel's service is excellent. Whether it's the front desk, restaurant, or room service, they are all very kind and friendly. We had a problem with the coffee machine in the room after 11 o'clock in the evening, and the staff came to deal with it as soon as possible. I think the bed and pillows are really good for me to sleep on. I am a person who loves beds and wakes up easily, but this time I slept really deeply, as if I had brought the bed home. There are so many plugs in the room that you don't have to fight. The sofa bed in the room is very comfortable for sitting or lying down.

Unexpected.. Cheap price but very beautiful. The room on level 11 has a beautiful view. Please check out before 12 o'clock if there is still a charge of RM 50. In 1.10 minutes there will be charge no. 2.. so in total I pay RM 100. So take note guys.. overall ok..

harga bilik disini murah, untuk satu mal: The price of the room here is cheap, for one night you can get under rm100. The room is clean, the aircond is cold, the iron kettle works, but I can't watch the TV. There are only 3 things that I am not satisfied with. 1. Parking - Parking fees are very expensive. RM10 for the first 8 hours. Even 30 minutes is still rm10. I parked one night from 730pm to 8am total Rm23. When my mom parked after dropping me off less than 1 hour, she charged rm25. When calls are busy rejecting, WhatsApp doesn't even reply. 2. Gloomy Environment - I recommend installing area lights towards the elevator, and outside areas. Because there are many foreigners here, there are good ones like those who keep the counter. But the worry is hanging around outside. I waited for my mother to park the car, I sat next to KK Mart. There is a Bangladeshi man in blue street and my fortune teller. He turned back to the end of the road but was still engrossed in spying. I entered KK even from afar and he followed. But alhamdulillah it was safe to enter the elevator and to the room. 3. Cleanliness around - The elevator is a bit smelly and there is tissue waste. I hope this issue can be maintained and resolved in the near future.
